behavior: 5 or more failed login attempts from the same IP within 5 minutes
Successful login after 5+ failed attempts from one IP within 10 minutes
context: Possible brute-force or credential stuffing success

behavior: Successful login from a new geographic location within 5 minutes of prior login
context: May indicate compromised credentials being used from different locations

behavior: Simultaneous logins to the same account from two different IPs within 2 minutes
context: Indicates potential credential sharing or account compromise

behavior: 3 or more RDP login attempts from the same IP within 5 minutes
context: Indicates possible remote brute-force or lateral movement via RDP

behavior: 3 or more SSH login failures from same IP within 5 minutes
Execution of command shell or scripting engine followed by network connection within 2 minutes
context: Indicates possible command execution with outbound communication

behavior: PowerShell launched with encoded command flag within process logs
context: Indicates obfuscated or malicious PowerShell usage

behavior: Bash shell spawning network connections within 2 minutes
context: Indicates possible remote command execution or reverse shell

behavior: Connections to 20 or more unique ports on a single host within 2 minutes
Connections to 10 or more hosts on same port within 2 minutes
Access to LSASS process followed by memory read within 1 minute
Execution of account enumeration commands followed by network logins within 5 minutes
context: Indicates account discovery preceding lateral movement

behavior: System information commands executed on 3+ hosts within 5 minutes
Host discovery commands executed followed by connections to discovered hosts within 5 minutes
context: Indicates network discovery followed by lateral movement

behavior: Event log cleared within 2 minutes of successful privileged login
context: Indicates attempt to remove forensic evidence

behavior: Deletion of log files within system directories within 5 minutes of suspicious activity
context: Indicates defense evasion via log removal

behavior: Security service stopped within 2 minutes of suspicious process execution
Firewall rules modified followed by outbound connection within 2 minutes
context: Indicates evasion to enable command and control

behavior: Process injecting into another process followed by network activity within 2 minutes
context: Indicates process injection for stealth execution

behavior: Execution of binary immediately after download from external IP within 2 minutes
context: Indicates ingress tool transfer and execution

behavior: Repeated connections to same external IP over uncommon port within 5 minutes
context: Indicates possible command and control communication

behavior: High-frequency HTTP requests to single domain within 2 minutes
Frequent DNS queries to same domain within 2 minutes
context: Indicates possible DNS tunneling or beaconing

behavior: Large volume of outbound data transferred within 5 minutes
Sensitive file access followed by outbound network transfer within 2 minutes
Mass file modifications (>50 files) within 2 minutes
Creation of ransom note files across multiple directories within 5 minutes
Registry run key modification followed by process execution within 5 minutes
Scheduled task created followed by execution within 5 minutes
New service created and started within 2 minutes
Registry modifications affecting security settings within 5 minutes
Email received with attachment followed by process execution within 2 minutes
User execution of downloaded file followed by network connection within 2 minutes
Multiple failed service logins followed by success within 5 minutes
Authentication using tokens without prior login event within 2 minutes
Access to credential files followed by login attempt within 2 minutes
Process name mimics legitimate system process but runs from non-standard directory
High volume of requests to single service within 2 minutes
context: Indicates potential denial of service activity

behavior: Network connection enumeration followed by outbound connections within 5 minutes
Network configuration commands executed on multiple hosts within 5 minutes
File transfer between internal hosts followed by execution within 5 minutes
Execution of binary with high entropy or obfuscated strings
Trusted binary executing unexpected child process within 2 minutes
Execution of unsigned or untrusted binary bypassing security controls
Deletion of volume shadow copies within 2 minutes
Stopping multiple services within 2 minutes
context: Indicates impact or defense evasion activity
